item.title: Lloyds Metals Joins Reliable Performers List Following Exceptional Q4 Results
item.description: Lloyds Metals, a mid-cap player in the ferrous metals sector, has been added to the esteemed Reliable Performers list as of 13 May 2026, following an exceptional quarter ending March 2026. The company’s robust financial growth, marked by record-breaking sales and profitability, underscores its rising prominence and strategic fit within portfolios seeking consistent fundamental strength and sustained price appreciation. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Dhanlaxmi Bank Joins MomentumNow Stocks on Strong Quarterly Performance
item.description: Dhanlaxmi Bank, a micro-cap private sector lender, has been added to the MomentumNow Stocks list as of 13 May 2026, following a remarkable quarter ending March 2026. The bank’s financial metrics have shown significant improvement, signalling a shift from a sideways trend to a mildly bullish stance, making it a compelling pick for momentum-focused investors. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Paras Defence Q4 FY26: Strong Momentum Drives 74% Profit Surge
item.description: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd., a specialised aerospace and defence manufacturer, delivered an impressive fourth quarter performance for FY26, with consolidated net profit surging 74.34% year-on-year to ₹34.38 crores. The company, commanding a market capitalisation of ₹6,612 crores, demonstrated robust operational momentum with revenue growing 58.28% YoY to ₹171.31 crores in Q4 FY26. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Tube Investments Q4 FY26: Strong Revenue Growth Marred by Tax-Driven Profit Volatility
item.description: Tube Investments of India Ltd. delivered a mixed performance in Q4 FY26, with consolidated net profit plunging 48.48% quarter-on-quarter to ₹85.45 crores, despite posting its highest-ever quarterly revenue of ₹6,214.74 crores. The sharp profit decline was primarily driven by an unusually elevated tax rate of 53.40%, which overshadowed robust operational performance marked by 20.68% year-on-year revenue growth and resilient operating margins. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Ester Industries Q4 FY25: Sharp Recovery Masks Persistent Margin Pressure
item.description: Ester Industries Ltd., a manufacturer of polyester films and engineering plastics, reported a consolidated net profit of ₹7.87 crores for Q4 FY25, marking a dramatic turnaround from three consecutive quarters of losses. The micro-cap packaging company, with a market capitalisation of ₹926.00 crores, delivered a sequential recovery that saw profitability return after a challenging nine-month period that witnessed cumulative losses exceeding ₹35 crores. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Perfectpac Ltd Q4 FY26: Margin Compression Signals Operational Strain
item.description: Perfectpac Limited, a Faridabad-based manufacturer of corrugated fibreboard containers with a market capitalisation of ₹57.00 crores, reported a net profit of ₹0.77 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a sequential improvement of 13.24% from Q3 FY26's ₹0.68 crores but representing a modest year-on-year growth of 13.24% from ₹0.68 crores in Q4 FY25. The company's shares closed at ₹85.00 on May 13, 2026, down 1.16% from the previous session, reflecting investor caution despite the quarterly recovery. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sharda Cropchem Q4 FY26: Record Quarter Drives 57% Profit Surge
item.description: Sharda Cropchem Ltd., a prominent player in India's pesticides and agrochemicals sector, delivered a stellar performance in Q4 FY26, posting consolidated net profit of ₹318.64 crores—a robust 56.53% year-on-year increase and a remarkable 119.57% quarter-on-quarter surge. The ₹10,657 crore market capitalisation company reported its highest-ever quarterly revenue of ₹2,064.90 crores, up 12.93% YoY and 60.22% QoQ, underscoring strong operational momentum as the fiscal year concluded. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: GlaxoSmithKline Pharmaceuticals Q4 FY26: Margin Compression Clouds Strong ROE Performance
item.description: GlaxoSmithKline Pharmaceuticals Ltd., the Indian subsidiary of global biopharma giant GSK Plc., reported a net profit of ₹277.86 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a decline of 6.01% quarter-on-quarter whilst posting a modest 5.70% year-on-year growth. The ₹41,704 crore mid-cap pharmaceutical company's shares traded at ₹2,406.85 on May 13, down 1.68% from the previous close, reflecting investor concerns over sequential margin compression despite the company maintaining an exceptional return on equity of 55.83%. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Foseco India Q4 FY26: Stellar Profit Surge Masks Valuation Concerns
item.description: Foseco India Limited, a world leader in foundry consumables and solutions, delivered an exceptional fourth quarter performance for FY26, with consolidated net profit surging 168.33% quarter-on-quarter to ₹33.81 crores and 72.94% year-on-year. The ₹4,025 crore market capitalisation company saw its stock rally 12.28% following the results announcement, closing at ₹5,421.55 on May 13, 2026. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Smruthi Organics Q4 FY26: Profit Rebounds But Revenue Slide Continues
item.description: Smruthi Organics Ltd., a micro-cap pharmaceutical company with a market capitalisation of ₹130.00 crores, reported a sequential recovery in profitability for the quarter ending March 2026, though the underlying revenue trends remain concerning. Net profit for Q4 FY26 stood at ₹1.07 crores, marking a decline of 23.60% quarter-on-quarter from ₹1.40 crores in Q3 FY26, whilst representing a sharp 52.02% decline year-on-year from ₹2.23 crores in Q4 FY25. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: OneSource Specialty Pharma Q4 FY26: Margin Collapse Masks Revenue Recovery
item.description: OneSource Specialty Pharma Ltd., a small-cap pharmaceutical company with a market capitalisation of ₹20,747 crores, reported a dramatic 95.33% year-on-year decline in consolidated net profit to ₹4.60 crores for Q4 FY26, despite achieving modest revenue growth. The stock has declined 2.34% following the results announcement, reflecting investor concerns over profitability erosion even as the company managed to recover from the previous quarter's substantial losses. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Q4 FY26: Profit Resilience Masks Revenue Decline
item.description: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd. reported a mixed performance for the quarter ended March 2026 (Q4 FY26), with net profit declining 17.64% quarter-on-quarter to ₹10.93 crores whilst revenue fell 27.43% year-on-year to ₹109.99 crores. The micro-cap chemical company, valued at ₹1,697 crores, faces mounting pressure as its stock plunged 4.72% following the results announcement, trading at ₹140.15 and extending its year-to-date decline to 30.02%. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Pyramid Technoplast Q4 FY26: Strong Quarter Masks Underlying Margin Pressures
item.description: Pyramid Technoplast Ltd., a micro-cap packaging company with a market capitalisation of ₹657.00 crores, reported a robust fourth quarter performance for FY26, with net profit surging 51.58% quarter-on-quarter to ₹10.02 crores. However, the impressive headline numbers conceal persistent margin challenges that have plagued the company throughout the fiscal year, raising questions about the sustainability of profitability improvements. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Flora Corporation Q4 FY26: Profits Surge Despite Revenue Contraction as Trading Firm Faces Volatility Concerns
item.description: Flora Corporation Ltd., a micro-cap trading and distribution firm with a market capitalisation of ₹7.00 crores, reported a dramatic swing to profitability in Q4 FY26 with net profit of ₹4.20 crores, reversing from losses in the previous two quarters. However, the profit surge came against a backdrop of sharply declining revenues, which fell 47.30% year-on-year to ₹26.15 crores, raising questions about the sustainability and quality of earnings at this volatile small-cap stock currently trading at ₹7.80. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Jet Freight Logistics Q4 FY26: Stellar Quarter Masks Underlying Structural Concerns
item.description: Jet Freight Logistics Ltd., a Mumbai-based freight forwarding and logistics solutions provider, delivered an impressive fourth quarter performance for FY26, with net profit surging 185.19% quarter-on-quarter to ₹3.08 crores from ₹1.08 crores in Q3 FY26. Year-on-year growth was even more remarkable at 805.88%, as the company posted ₹0.34 crores in Q4 FY25. Following the results announcement, the stock rallied 10.08% to close at ₹21.19 on May 13, 2026, pushing its market capitalisation to ₹90.00 crores. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Kirloskar Brothers Q4 FY26: Margin Pressure Weighs on Profitability Despite Revenue Growth
item.description: Kirloskar Brothers Ltd., the century-old engineering powerhouse specialising in fluid-handling equipment and turnkey projects, reported a mixed performance for the quarter ended March 2026, with robust revenue growth offset by concerning margin compression. The company posted a consolidated net profit of ₹111.50 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a sequential decline of 10.30% from ₹124.30 crores in Q3 FY26 and a year-on-year drop of 18.67% from ₹137.10 crores in Q4 FY25. The stock reacted sharply to the results, plunging 5.88% to close at ₹1,583.35 on May 13, 2026, reflecting investor concerns over profitability trends despite the company's market capitalisation standing at ₹13,373 crores. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Power Finance Corporation Q4 FY26: Profit Surge Masks Valuation Concerns
item.description: Power Finance Corporation Ltd., India's Maharatna infrastructure finance behemoth with a market capitalisation of ₹1,44,808 crores, reported a consolidated net profit of ₹6,998.99 crores for Q4 FY26, marking an impressive 11.23% quarter-on-quarter growth and a solid 10.81% year-on-year expansion. The stock gained 1.23% to close at ₹446.10 on May 13, trading 8.29% below its 52-week high of ₹486.45, as investors digested the results against the backdrop of a "HOLD" rating from proprietary analysis with a score of 58 out of 100. Time: 3 hours ago
